name: live2d-haxe
description: Live2D Cubism SDK for Haxe - GPU shader rendering with multi-backend abstraction (cpp + hl)
releasenote: v0.6.0: HashLink (HL) backend support via .hdll native extension. Auto-detects Lime 8.0.1/8.3.0, compatible with both runtimes. JIT-accelerated iteration, Heaps engine compatibility. No breaking changes.
